cleavage agent: enzymatically digested into peptides using trypsin
enrichment method: C-terminally fused to EGFP for immunoprecipitation (IP)
fragmentation method: fragmented using high-energy collisional dissociation with 25 normalized collision energy
instrument: analyzed by tandem mass spectrometry using Thermo Q-Exactive Plus Orbitrap
labeling: the relative abundance of N-terminally-acetylated peptides of the wildtype versus naa10Δ, naa15Δ, and the two NAA15 mutants: R354A, R355A and R354E, R355E
